title: Atrium provenance report (provenance/v1)
description: The report an OpenClaw gateway plugin emits on the `<pluginId>.provenance` agent-event stream to tell the Atrium chat UI which sources fed a reply. Atrium OWNS this contract (it defines the Sources UI); a plugin conforms to it. The bridge (bridge/src/core/provenance.ts) re-validates AND bounds/truncates every field on the trust boundary, so passing this schema is necessary but the bridge caps still apply. `pluginId` is NOT part of the emitted report — the gateway stamps the authenticated emitter id. See docs/provenance/PROVENANCE_CONTRACT.md.

v.description: Contract version. The bridge ignores any report whose v != 1 (forward-compat).

source.description: Reporting source family, e.g. "knowledge" | "hindsight". Required + non-empty (the bridge drops a report whose source is empty).

kind.description: Report group → the Sources UI section. `memory` = conversational recall; `documents` = documentary retrieval (findable documents AND/OR synthesized context excerpts).

chars.description: Total chars of the section actually delivered to the LLM.

items.description: Retrieved items (at least one — the bridge drops a report with no citable item). The bridge caps the array at 24 and each item text at 2000 chars.

item.description: One retrieved item. Its KIND for the UI is derived (see convex/lib/provenance.ts provenanceItemKind): a `memory`-report item is memory; a `documents`-report item is a CONTEXT excerpt when `context:true` OR it has no `file_name` (backward-compat), else a findable DOCUMENT. Only a findable document is openable/attachable. An item MUST carry at least one supported field — the bridge drops an item with none (an empty/unknown-only object is noise).

id.description: Stable item id (memory items; a context blob's sentinel).

file_name.description: The openable source file/path. PRESENT ⟹ a findable document (unless `context:true`).

context.description: Declares a SYNTHESIZED context excerpt (no openable source), e.g. LightRAG's whole-graph blob. Only meaningful in a `documents` report. Only the literal `true` is honored.

type.description: Free-form item type / retrieval mode (e.g. the LightRAG query mode). NOT a kind discriminator.

text.description: The injected excerpt (level "full" only). NEVER the retrieved-but-not-injected text of a non-injected source.
